title: codev.json
description: Manifest for CoDev imported as a Git submodule. Validated by codev-init and codev-update.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI for editor validation. Optional but recommended.

version.description: Manifest schema version. Must be '1' for the current schema.

submodulePath.description: Relative path from the repository root to the CoDev submodule directory.

overrideStrategy.description: How host assets in overridesDir interact with submodule-managed assets. 'extend' adds new assets alongside; 'override' replaces same-named managed assets.

overridesDir.description: Relative path from the repository root to the directory containing host-specific customizations. Files here are never touched by codev update or codev teardown.

pinnedRef.description: Git tag or commit SHA of the CoDev version in use. Informational only — does not change submodule state. Used for audit and documentation.

managedPaths.description: Explicit list of host paths managed by CoDev. Defaults to all standard CoDev asset paths when omitted.
